name: compose-best-practices
description: Jetpack Compose best practices for MAD architecture and Android UI quality governance.

interface.shortDescription: Jetpack Compose review and refactor guidance.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for Jetpack Compose best practices, covering MAD architecture, unidirectional data flow, state hoisting, side effects, lifecycle-aware Flow collection, Lazy layouts, recomposition performance, component APIs, accessibility, and Preview coverage.
defaultPrompt: Review this Jetpack Compose code for best-practice violations.
Refactor this Compose screen to follow state down, events up.
Check this Compose UI for recomposition and side-effect risks.
